CustomField.formula: IF(NATT_Customer_Contact__r.MailingStreet <> "",NATT_Customer_Contact__r.MailingStreet + BR(),NULL) + IF(NATT_Customer_Contact__r.MailingCity <> "",NATT_Customer_Contact__r.MailingCity + ", ",NULL) + NATT_Customer_Contact__r.MailingState + " " + NATT_Customer_Contact__r.MailingPostalCode + BR() + NATT_Customer_Contact__r.MailingCountry
CustomField.label: Customer Mailing Address
